---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Problem / motivation
What clinical or developer problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## ✨ Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔌 Type of feature
- [ ] New agent (e.g. nutrition, triage, radiology)
- [ ] New data source / MCP sidecar
- [ ] New EHR adapter (see `docs/EHR_ADAPTER.md`)
- [ ] New lab-report parser / language
- [ ] UI / UX / accessibility
- [ ] Performance / cost
- [ ] Other

## 🔄 Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📎 Additional context
Mockups, links, references, or examples (no PHI).
